title: Questions from Quarantine: Looking Forward to 2021
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project presents a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who answer public questions about managing life during the COVID-19 pandemic. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' invites viewers to submit queries via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. Each Tuesday, the hosts provide guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being amidst the global crisis. The article promotes this ongoing interactive program while situating it within the broader context of the think tank's work on coronavirus, global health, and public health policy. It references other related expert analyses on topics such as potential mass migration, school reopenings, and pandemic preparedness, illustrating the organization's multifaceted approach to emerging health security challenges.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，回答公众关于在COVID-19大流行期间管理生活的疑问。该系列节目名为“隔离问题”，邀请观众通过社交媒体使用标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine提交问题。每周二，主持人会就如何在全球危机中保持身心健康提供指导。文章推广了这一持续进行的互动项目，并将其置于该智库在冠状病毒、全球健康和公共卫生政策等更广泛工作的背景下。文中还引用了其他相关的专家分析，涉及潜在的大规模移民、学校重新开放和大流行病防范等主题，展示了该组织应对新兴健康安全挑战的多方面方法。
